info.name: Zao API
info.description:
Complete Zao platform API. Base: {{base_url}} (default http://localhost:8000).

Auth: Bearer {{access_token}} on authenticated endpoints. Login via POST /api/auth/login/.

item.description: Request invite OTP (replaces old invite/accept flow).
item.name: Request Invite OTP [Public]

item.description: Verify invite OTP and activate account.
item.name: Verify Invite OTP [Public]

item.description: List all versions of a legal document.
item.name: List Versions [Public]

item.description: Get specific version of a legal document.
item.name: Get Version [Public]

item.description: List documents pending acceptance for the current user (requires auth).
item.name: Pending Acceptances [Auth]
